summary: Customer Experience Regression & Flow Integrity Validation Complete. All critical customer flows verified working: Auth (password login), CustomerHome (active case display, action pills, explore banner), Bottom Nav (5 tabs routing correctly to customer pages, NOT team portal), Case Detail (5 tabs - Overview/Messages/Shared/Payments/Timeline all switching correctly), Messaging (send/receive working), Profile (dark hero, editable name, disabled email, chip selectors, notifications toggle), Venue Search & Detail (START PLANNING CTA visible), /my-enquiries redirect to /home. Auth boundaries intact - no customer nav leads to /login or /team routes.
critical_code_review_comments: AUTH FLOW VERIFIED: Password login (democustomer@venulock.in / password123) works, redirects to /home
CUSTOMER HOME VERIFIED: Dark brand bar, greeting 'Welcome back, Test', active case hero (Anniversary in Mumbai), action pills (Messages/Payments/Shared), explore venues banner, other bookings list
BOTTOM NAV VERIFIED: 5 tabs (Home/Explore/My Case/Messages/Profile) all route to correct customer pages, NOT to /login or /team
CASE DETAIL VERIFIED: Header with back button, stage progress bar (9% - Planning Your Visit), 5 section tabs (Overview/Messages/Shared/Payments/Timeline) all switch content correctly

OVERVIEW TAB VERIFIED: Event hero banner (Anniversary, Mumbai, 15 Jun 2026, 200 guests), RM card (Ravi Sharma), Assistance section (Request a Callback dark priority card, Schedule Site Visit, Ask a Question)
MESSAGES TAB VERIFIED: Chat interface with RM name, message history displayed, message input and send button functional, sent message appears in chat
SHARED TAB VERIFIED: Shared items section renders correctly
PAYMENTS TAB VERIFIED: Shows payment summary (₹1,30,000 paid), payment history with 4 items (Booking Deposit, Site Visit Booking, Milestone Payment)
TIMELINE TAB VERIFIED: Timeline section renders correctly
STICKY CTA VERIFIED: 'Message Your RM' button fixed at bottom of case detail page

PROFILE PAGE VERIFIED: Dark hero with avatar initial 'T', name 'Test Customer', email 'democustomer@venulock.in', editable name input, disabled email input, chip selectors for Preferred Cities and Event Types, Budget Range selector (1L-3L selected), Notifications toggle, Save Changes and Sign Out buttons
VENUE SEARCH VERIFIED: Curated Venues page shows 86 venues across 9 cities, featured venues (Taj Mahal Palace Mumbai, Taj Palace New Delhi)
VENUE DETAIL VERIFIED: Back button, venue name, location, rating, pricing (₹6.5K veg, ₹8.0K non-veg), About section, Amenities, 'START PLANNING' CTA button at bottom
MY-ENQUIRIES REDIRECT VERIFIED: /my-enquiries redirects to /home for authenticated users
AUTH BOUNDARY VERIFIED: Bottom nav never navigates to /login or /team routes, /login is separate team portal login page
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer experience regression complete. All premium UI refinements from iteration 167 still working. Active case is 'Anniversary' in Mumbai with RM 'Ravi Sharma' (lead_id: lead_21668ed1ecd9). Customer has 4 cases total. Payments show ₹1,30,000 paid. Messages section has active conversation. Bottom nav has 5 tabs with prominent 'My Case' dark circle treatment. Profile page has chip selectors for preferences. Venue detail has 'START PLANNING' CTA. Auth boundary is intact - customer nav never leads to /login or /team routes.
